verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In Your presence, there is fullness of life And healing flowing, for body soul and mind God of miracles, God of the impossible is here God is here

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is here Let the broken hearted rejoice (Lift up your head) God is here Let the sick say I am well (All sufficient One) God is here Let the weak say I am strong (let the weak say I am strong) God is here His wonders to perform
